proven.claim: Proven: the (check-sat) filter is conservative — output cannot exceed matched blocks.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; Proven: the (check-sat) filter is conservative — output cannot exceed matched blocks.
; Precondition:  total_matched >= 0, with_checksat <= total_matched
; Transition:    output_count = with_checksat   (the filter keeps only those blocks)
; Negation:      output_count > total_matched
(declare-const total_matched Int)
(declare-const with_checksat Int)
(declare-const output_count Int)
(assert (>= total_matched 0))
(assert (>= with_checksat 0))
(assert (<= with_checksat total_matched))
(assert (= output_count with_checksat))
(assert (> output_count total_matched))
(check-sat)
; unsat — output_count <= total_matched is invariant

clause_history.clause:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; Proven: the (check-sat) filter is conservative — output cannot exceed matched blocks.
; Precondition:  total_matched >= 0, with_checksat <= total_matched
; Transition:    output_count = with_checksat   (the filter keeps only those blocks)
; Negation:      output_count > total_matched
(declare-const total_matched Int)
(declare-const with_checksat Int)
(declare-const output_count Int)
(assert (>= total_matched 0))
(assert (>= with_checksat 0))
(assert (<= with_checksat total_matched))
(assert (= output_count with_checksat))
(assert (> output_count total_matched))
(check-sat)
; unsat — output_count <= total_matched is invariant
